name: Guangbo Group Stock Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangbo Group Stock Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, engages in the development, production, import, and sale of office stationery, printing paper products, and plastic products in China. It offers products, such as books, photo albums, color printing and packaging products, office supplies, and gifts, as well as logistic services. The company also exports its products to Europe, America, Southeast Asia, and other countries and regions. Guangbo Group Stock Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Ningbo, China.
